# PIKORUA Realty

PIKORUA Realty is a private luxury real estate advisory based in Ahmedabad, India. It deals exclusively in residential properties — luxury apartments, penthouses, villas, bungalows, and premium plots — for discerning buyers, NRIs, and investors. Properties are curated and shared privately with qualified buyers rather than published on public listing portals.

## Key pages

- Home: https://pikorua.in/
- Properties: https://pikorua.in/properties
- About: https://pikorua.in/about
- Testimonials: https://pikorua.in/testimonials
- Contact: https://pikorua.in/contact
- Blog (market insights & NRI advisory): https://pikorua.in/blog
- Sindhu Bhavan Road luxury properties: https://pikorua.in/locations/sindhu-bhavan
- Iskon-Ambli Road luxury properties: https://pikorua.in/locations/iskon-ambli
- Thaltej luxury properties: https://pikorua.in/locations/thaltej
- Shilaj villas and plots: https://pikorua.in/locations/shilaj
- Vaishno Devi luxury properties: https://pikorua.in/locations/vaishno-devi
- SG Highway luxury properties: https://pikorua.in/locations/sg-highway
- Luxury apartments in Ahmedabad: https://pikorua.in/property-types/luxury-apartments-ahmedabad
- Penthouses and duplex homes in Ahmedabad: https://pikorua.in/property-types/penthouses-duplexes-ahmedabad
- Villas and bungalows in Ahmedabad: https://pikorua.in/property-types/villas-bungalows-ahmedabad
- Premium residential plots in Ahmedabad: https://pikorua.in/property-types/residential-plots-ahmedabad
- Luxury residential investment properties in Ahmedabad: https://pikorua.in/property-types/luxury-residential-investment-ahmedabad
- Privacy policy: https://pikorua.in/privacy
- Terms of use: https://pikorua.in/terms

## Contact

For inquiries, use the contact form at https://pikorua.in/contact.

## Notes for automated access

- Do not crawl or index /admin, /studio, or /api — these are operational and have no public content.
- Property availability and pricing change frequently; treat /properties as the source of truth rather than caching it long-term.
